opinion.p: 560 U. S. ____ (2010) 560 U. S. ____ (2010) 560 U. S. ____ (2010) SUPREME COURT OF THE UNITED STATES NO. 08-7621 JOE HARRIS SULLIVAN, PETITIONER v. FLORIDA
on writ of certiorari to the district court of appeal of florida, first district
The writ of certiorari is dismissed as improvidently granted.
